posts.text: Not a huge impact from Iran yet, but a new net low in our Trump approval tracking today fwiw.

posts.text: There's plenty of appetite for progressivism, etc., within the Democratic electorate, but the Very Online version of it doesn't really travel well.
posts.quote: There's plenty of appetite for progressivism, etc., within the Democratic electorate, but the Very Online version of it doesn't really travel well.

posts.text: Wrote about the game theory of the TACO trade. Which gets a lot more complicated when you're facing something like war in the Middle East.
posts.quote: Wrote about the game theory of the TACO trade. Which gets a lot more complicated when you're facing something like war in the Middle East.

posts.text: The TACO trade meets the fog of war. Counting on Trump to "always chicken out" is a risky strategy. And war in the Middle East is a different game.
posts.quote: The TACO trade meets the fog of war. Counting on Trump to "always chicken out" is a risky strategy. And war in the Middle East is a different game.

posts.text: Gas prices are set to go vertical. It's not exactly a bold prediction to suggest this will be bad for Trump's political standing.
posts.quote: Gas prices are set to go vertical. It's not exactly a bold prediction to suggest this will be bad for Trump's political standing.

posts.text: War isn't what it once was. Past precedents are less useful than you'd think when predicting a war's political impact. But Iran still poses downside risks for Trump.
posts.quote: War isn't what it once was. Past precedents are less useful than you'd think when predicting a war's political impact. But Iran still poses downside risks for Trump.

iran-conflict.quote: Not a huge impact from Iran yet, but a new net low in our Trump approval tracking today fwiw.
Wrote about the game theory of the TACO trade. Which gets a lot more complicated when you're facing something like war in the Middle East.
The TACO trade meets the fog of war. Counting on Trump to "always chicken out" is a risky strategy. And war in the Middle East is a different game.
War isn't what it once was. Past precedents are less useful than you'd think when predicting a war's political impact. But Iran still poses downside risks for Trump.
